title: San Diego to Joshua Tree
script: Two and a half hours from the San Diego coast, the desert takes over completely. You trade ocean breeze for towering Joshua trees and giant boulder piles. Stop in Palm Springs, then roll into the park right before sunset when the whole desert glows orange. Would you make this drive?
whyTrending: Desert national parks trending on TikTok for spring road trips 2026

title: Denver to Moab
script: This is the drive that turns the Rockies into red rock. You start a mile high in Denver, cut through Glenwood Canyon along the river, and five hours later you're standing in front of the arches of Moab. Mountains, canyons, and desert in a single afternoon. Adding this to your bucket list yet?
whyTrending: Moab and Arches consistently viral for overlanding and van-life content

title: Portland to the Oregon Coast
script: In about ninety minutes you can go from Portland's coffee shops to standing under Haystack Rock with your feet in the Pacific. Detour through Astoria where the Goonies was filmed, then chase the fog down the coast. This is the easiest big-payoff drive in the Pacific Northwest. Who are you taking?
whyTrending: Pacific Northwest coast drives booming for cozy autumn travel content

title: Nice to Monaco
script: This might be the most beautiful thirty minutes of coastline in the world. You follow the cliffside road out of Nice, wind up to the medieval village of Eze hanging over the sea, and drop straight into the glamour of Monaco. Supercars, superyachts, and the Mediterranean the whole way. Dream drive or what?
whyTrending: French Riviera luxury travel trending ahead of summer 2026

title: Queenstown to Milford Sound
script: People fly across the planet just to do this drive. From adventure-capital Queenstown you head to Te Anau, then into Fiordland, where the road threads between waterfalls and thousand-metre cliffs before opening onto Milford Sound. It's often called the eighth wonder of the world. Believe the hype?
whyTrending: New Zealand South Island road trips perennial bucket-list viral content

title: Barcelona to Costa Brava
script: Leave Barcelona and the coastline just keeps getting better. Wander the old stone streets of Girona, swim below the castle at Tossa de Mar, then finish in whitewashed Cadaques, the seaside town Salvador Dali called home. Turquoise coves the entire way. Which stop would you never leave?
whyTrending: Costa Brava hidden-gem beaches trending on European travel TikTok

title: Cape Town to Cape Point
script: One peninsula, two oceans, and some of the most dramatic coastal road on Earth. You hug the cliffs of Chapman's Peak out of Hout Bay, stop to see the penguins at Simon's Town, and end at Cape Point where the Atlantic meets the Indian Ocean. All of this in an afternoon from the city. Adding it to the list?
whyTrending: South Africa peninsula drives surging with wildlife travel content

title: Tokyo to Hakone
script: In under two hours you can trade Tokyo's neon for hot springs with a view of Mount Fuji. The road climbs out of the city into the mountains of Hakone, past the lake, the shrine gate on the water, and steaming volcanic valleys. It's the weekend escape locals swear by. Would you soak here?
whyTrending: Japan onsen and Mount Fuji content consistently viral in 2026

title: Toronto to Niagara Falls
script: Ninety minutes from downtown Toronto and you're standing in the mist of one of the most famous waterfalls on the planet. Take the long way through Niagara-on-the-Lake, roll past the vineyards, then follow the river until the falls come into view. Easy trip, unreal payoff. Have you felt that mist yet?
whyTrending: Canada easy day-trip drives trending for shoulder-season travel

title: Reykjavik to Vik
script: This stretch of Iceland's Ring Road is a greatest-hits reel. In under three hours you pass two of the country's most famous waterfalls, walk out onto black sand beaches, and end in the tiny village of Vik beneath the sea cliffs. Waterfalls, glaciers, and black sand in one drive. Where would you stop first?
whyTrending: Iceland Ring Road southern coast a perennial viral road-trip favorite
